# Research

Figma Design (AI-generated): [Slot Machine Design 1 – Figma Make](https://www.figma.com/make/BmIN557ZW2uC7AOAOaoaMR/Slot-Machine-Design-1?t=SRTONpJpBIZcNw32-0)  
![][image1]  
Raw Materials About Slot Machines Apps:

* UI/UX design  
* Game mechanics  
* RNG  
* Reward/loyalty programs  
* Social features  
* Cross-platform compatibility  
* Payment integration  
* Customization  
* Source(s):  
  * [Slot Machine Game Development | Best Slot Software Providers](https://www.troniextechnologies.com/blog/slot-machine-game#key-features-of-a-slot-machine-game-2026-edition)

Jargon Used:

* Bet: amount of money wagered on a single spin  
  * Min: minimum money that needs to be spent  
  * Max: maximum money that can be spent  
* Big Bertha: popular oversized slot machines   
* Cashback: offers percentage of a person’s losses back (like insurance)  
* Cold slot: machine that doesn’t seem to have paid out recently  
* Five liner: a classic slot machine with five paylines, offering five potential ways to win  
* Source(s):  
  * [Slot Machine Terminology \- Slang & Lingo Glossary \- 666 Casino](https://www.666casino.com/blog/slot-machine-terminology/)

Features:

* Stimulating  
  * Bright colors  
  * Loud, appealing sounds  
  * Smooth yet strong button responses/animations  
* Symbols  
  * Multipliers  
  * Wild  
* Multiple reels  
  * Common ones are three and five  
* Source(s):  
  * [Types of Online Slots Explained for Beginners](https://piegaming.com/blog/different-types-online-slots-their-features/)

Types of Users:

* Stressed from life  
* Wants thrill/to feel adrenaline  
* Low effort, big results  
* Social interaction  
* Looking for nostalgia  
* Source(s):  
  * [8 Reasons Why People Play Slots \- Choctaw Slots](https://www.choctawslots.com/blog/why-people-play-slots/)

Visual Themes:

* Money (fortune and wealth)  
* Mythology and history  
* Animals and nature  
* Vegas  
* Wild West  
* Fantasy  
* Culture (i.e. China)  
* Horror/spooky  
* Food and cooking  
* Superheroes  
* Pirates  
* Source(s):  
  * [25 Slot Machine Themes Revealed \- Choctaw Slots](https://www.choctawslots.com/blog/slot-machine-themes/)

Popular Types of Slot Machines:  
![][image2]![][image3]![][image4]![][image5]

# Persona

Persona 1:

* Name: Nicole  
* Details: Sociopathic high school student that wants to use the money she gets from manipulating guys when bored. Gets bored especially when in class.  
* Wants and Needs: Wants an app that she can secretly play in class   
* Doesn’t want or need: Lame design, no risk and reward

Persona 2:

* Name: Jared  
* Details: A “stay-at-home” (unemployed) male divorcee with joint custody of three kids that spends his child care funds on women, whether they are fake or real  
* Wants and Needs: A fun, rewarding way to give money to these “women,” validation  
* Doesn’t want or need: His wife/whoever is giving him money to know, no attention/interactions with the “women”

# User Stories

User Story \#1: As a bored high school student, I want entertainment, so that I can pass class time.  
User Story \#2: As a lonely adult, I want attention and praise, so that I feel like I’m desirable and not worthless.  
User Story \#3: As a single parent, I want to do something that is not too mentally taxing, so that I can take a break from taking care of my children.  
User Story \#4: As a person who receives a lot of free money, I want to use it to earn my own money, so that I feel less guilty about it not being my own money.  
User Story \#5: As an unemployed person, I want a way to see results and earn rewards, so that I feel productive.
